coping_shade_signal: mere hatho ki ungliyan thar-tharane lagi hain

speaker: Supporter

text: Teen steps lo: 1) 5 minute paani sips + deep breaths, 2) ghar ko short update bhejo ki role issue aaya hai aur tum action mein ho, 3) aaj 10 minute mein 3 job targets likho.

speaker: Seeker
